channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: The U.S. government moves $606,000 in bitcoin linked to the 2016 Bitfinex hack to Coinbase
item.description: Bitfinex plans to use the returned coins to redeem all Recovery Right Tokens and devote at least 80 percent of remaining net proceeds to repurchasing and burning its UNUS SED LEO token....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: XRP leads bitcoin and ether on weekly gains, but muted volume keeps breakout in check
item.description: Token outperforms bitcoin and ether over seven days, though thinning participation signals consolidation rather than conviction....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Will Markets Break Resistance When $2B Crypto Options Expire Today?
item.description: Friday has rolled around again, and that means more Bitcoin and Ether options are expiring as spot markets hold on to recent gains....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: Bitcoin bulls target $125,000 as U.S.-Iran peace talks trigger risk-on mood
item.description: Funding rates at 2023 lows signal the market is heavily short against bitcoin, ZeroStack's Daniel Reis-Faria says, setting up conditions for a forced unwind if prices push higher....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Apache ActiveMQ CVE-2026-34197 Added to CISA KEV Amid Active Exploitation
item.description: A recently disclosed high-severity security flaw in Apache ActiveMQ Classic has come under active exploitation in the wild, per the U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA). To tha...

item.title: Operation PowerOFF identifies 75k DDoS users, takes down 53 domains
item.description: The latest wave of "Operation PowerOFF," on April 13, 2026, targeted the distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) ecosystem and its users across 21 countries. [...]...

item.title: ZionSiphon malware designed to sabotage water treatment systems
item.description: A new malware called ZionSiphon, specifically designed for operational technology, is targeting water treatment and desalination environments to sabotage their operations. [...]...

item.title: Double trouble: Hackers used both Claude Code and ChatGPT in a cybersecurity hack that lasted two and a half months.

item.title: Bitcoin whales just bought the most BTC since 2013 – so why is the price stuck below $80,000?

item.title: Cardano's Charles Hoskinson says Bitcoin's quantum fix is a hard fork that can't save Satoshi's coins
item.description: The Cardano founder argues BIP-361 is mislabeled as a soft fork and that its zero-knowledge recovery plan cannot rescue roughly 1.7 million pre-2013 bitcoin, including Satoshi's holdings....
